requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

r_tnma_loan_req_detail_newnest1.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type FROM sc_lon_m_loan_history, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' and ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} )

r_tnma_loan_req_detail_newnest2.sql: select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code , sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = {0}
